sample_sentence: The voluble car salesman managed to talk the hesitant customer into purchasing the most expensive model on the lot.
The armed rebel forces fought fiercely to wrest political control of the capital city away from the entrenched dictator.
The religious zealot stood on the busy street corner for hours, aggressively preaching his radical beliefs to anyone who walked by.
